assessmentPrinciples: Assessment data in the Project X intelligence layer is aggregated or anonymised.
Questions assess concepts; concepts connect to Canonical Teaching Objects.
The curriculum layer never stores student identity.
Assessment intelligence identifies gaps and next actions without exposing pupil-level data.
